greeting.text: Hello, I'm James. I refine materials slowly because clean inputs make reliable machines.

dialogue_tree.text: Bring extracts, resins, wet samples, and rough materials. I can filter, dry, purify, and turn them into refined copper, insulators, and stable components.
I label everything twice. Once for the shelf, once for future me, who is very grateful.
